install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y build-essential patchelf libgl1-mesa-dev libgl1-mesa-glx libglew-dev libosmesa6-dev software-properties-common git wget && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
uv pip install --system 'gymnasium[mujoco]>=0.29' 'stable-baselines3>=2.2.0' numpy scipy torch tqdm
python -c "import gymnasium; env = gymnasium.make('HalfCheetah-v4'); env.reset(); env.close(); print('MuJoCo OK')"
